field.title: ID контакт АМО
field.formula:
IF [geo] = 'ОАЭ' THEN
    URL('https://bneginskogo.amocrm.ru/contacts/detail/' + STR([any_contacts_amo_id]), STR([any_contacts_amo_id]))
ELSEIF [geo] = 'Москва' THEN
    URL('https://bneginskogomsk.amocrm.ru/contacts/detail/' + STR([any_contacts_amo_id]), STR([any_contacts_amo_id]))
ELSE
    URL('https://bneginskogoeng.amocrm.ru/contacts/detail/' + STR([any_contacts_amo_id]), STR([any_contacts_amo_id]))
END
field.guid_formula:
IF [geo_omot] = 'ОАЭ' THEN
    URL('https://bneginskogo.amocrm.ru/contacts/detail/' + STR([any_contacts_amo_id_7pdt]), STR([any_contacts_amo_id_7pdt]))
ELSEIF [geo_omot] = 'Москва' THEN
    URL('https://bneginskogomsk.amocrm.ru/contacts/detail/' + STR([any_contacts_amo_id_7pdt]), STR([any_contacts_amo_id_7pdt]))
ELSE
    URL('https://bneginskogoeng.amocrm.ru/contacts/detail/' + STR([any_contacts_amo_id_7pdt]), STR([any_contacts_amo_id_7pdt]))
END

field.title: visible
field.formula: IF ([invite_link_name] IS NOT NULL, TRUE, FALSE)
field.guid_formula: IF ([invite_link_name_0op2] IS NOT NULL, TRUE, FALSE)

field.title: CRL
field.formula:
IF COUNTD([user_id]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([leads]) / countd([user_id])
END
field.guid_formula:
IF COUNTD([user_id_zqij]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([leads_mdbs]) / countd([user_id_zqij])
END

field.title: CRQ
field.formula:
IF [Лидов уник.] > 0 THEN
    [Квалов уник.] / [Лидов уник.]
END

items.title: CRL
items.guid_formula:
IF COUNTD([user_id_zqij]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([leads_mdbs]) / countd([user_id_zqij])
END
items.formula:
IF COUNTD([user_id]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([leads]) / countd([user_id])
END

items.title: CRQ
